---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something Lasca should do
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

<!-- One paragraph describing the feature. Don't worry about "the right way" — describe the user-visible behavior. -->

## Why you want it

<!-- The problem this solves, or the workflow it enables. Concrete examples are best. -->

## Anything you've ruled out

<!-- Optional. If you've thought about alternative shapes for this and rejected them, mention them so reviewers don't repeat your reasoning. -->

## Are you willing to send a PR for this?

<!-- "Yes", "Maybe with some pointers", or "No, just suggesting" — all valid. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, etc. -->
